text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While heading to the training room...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping you might join me for tea when you
have time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You may invite my royal presence
whenever!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I shall indeed. Well then, until next time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That was great. I wonder what kind of Japanese
sweets she'll bring next? Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: King! What excellent timing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, McQueen! Can I help you with
something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering if you'd like to accompany me to
a dessert buffet. The restaurant is well-connected
with the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That sounds lovely! It would give us a chance to
relax as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've also heard that special seasonal cakes will be
available. I hope you'll look forward to them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'll be in touch.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now I have a treat waiting for me after
training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: There you are, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh my, I'm quite popular today.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you want to join us for some sweets after
school tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can make time for that! I am a
magnanimous king, after all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: You're the best! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Did you want to make plans with me
too?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So be it! Whatever desserts may come, I stand
ready to devour them!
choice_data_list: Aren't you eating a bit too much sugar?
Aren't you eating a bit too much sugar?

I'm glad to see you're getting along so well with
everyone!

I'm glad to see you're getting along so well with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So be it! Whatever desserts may come, I stand
ready to devour them!
choice_data_list: Aren't you eating a bit too much sugar?
Aren't you eating a bit too much sugar?

I'm glad to see you're getting along so well with
everyone!

I'm glad to see you're getting along so well with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting I would be so negligent in
managing my weight as to consume a surplus of
calories?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hah! Inconceivable!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, um, maybe I could give your words a bit
more consideration...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From now on, I'll have people invite me to less
calorie-dense outings!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh? You think so?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I suppose my royal virtue wins over many hearts!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy—you can always invite me out for
tea as well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just make sure you have some sweets ready.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I later hear that King Halo is often invited out
because of her friendliness and sweet tooth.
